title: store.rs get_space_invites(None) has no LIMIT — unbounded result for spaces with many invites
description: store.rs get_space_invites: the ids=None branch fetches all rows from space_invite WHERE membership check, with no LIMIT. A space with many uncleaned invites returns all of them in one query. SpaceInvite/get ids:null fetches unbounded rows into memory. Unlike the 1000-row cap on contacts and members, invites have no cap. Scenario: space admin creates thousands of invite codes over time without revoking old ones; SpaceInvite/get ids:null OOMs or saturates DB.
